core_mechanism: evaluation of the determinant of a linear differential operator (a product over its spectrum) by recasting the spectral sum/product as a contour integral in the complex plane, exploiting the analytic structure and zeros of an associated function via residue/argument-principle calculus
brief_reason: The abstract computes a pre-exponential factor that is a functional determinant of fluctuations about a solution using contour integrals in the complex plane, relying only on ordinary differential equations and complex-variable (residue) techniques.
